profile.name: Ansh Parikh
profile.title: Senior Software Engineer
profile.tagline: Building elegant digital experiences with clean code and thoughtful design.
profile.about: I'm a passionate developer with 3+ years of experience crafting web applications that are fast, accessible, and delightful to use. I specialize in Angular, TypeScript, and cloud-native architectures. When I'm not coding, you'll find me contributing to open source or exploring new design patterns.

projects.title: TaskFlow Pro
projects.description: A collaborative project management platform with real-time updates, kanban boards, and team analytics.

projects.title: DevMetrics Dashboard
projects.description: Engineering analytics dashboard tracking deployment frequency, lead time, and code quality metrics.

projects.title: EcoTrack API
projects.description: RESTful API for carbon footprint tracking with ML-powered recommendations and sustainability scoring.

projects.title: PixelForge Studio
projects.description: Browser-based design tool for creating responsive UI mockups with component libraries and export options.

experience.description: Lead development of customer-facing Angular applications serving 500K+ users. Architected micro-frontend strategy reducing deploy times by 60%.
Built MVP products from scratch using Angular, Node.js, and AWS. Implemented CI/CD pipelines and automated testing achieving 90% code coverage.
